items.item: IKAN KEMBUNG KECIL/PELALING (ANTARA 10 HINGGA 18 EKOR SEKILOGRAM)

ceiling.since_note: Reported unchanged for approximately 17 years as of the source article (~2009).

ceiling.label_bm: Harga siling minyak masak paket bersubsidi
ceiling.label_en: Subsidised 1kg packet cooking oil price ceiling
ceiling.since_note: Long-running subsidised-oil scheme; exact start date not independently verified. Reported still enforced as of June 2026 (KPDN deactivated 179 companies from the eCOSS distribution system for violations, 12 Jun 2026).

premises.premise: MASLEE EXPRES B5 JOHOR STREET MARKET

seat.issue_bm: Ingat krisis air November lepas? Kolam basuhan lombong pasir pecah dan cemari Sungai Johor — 455,499 akaun air di JB, Kulai dan Kota Tinggi kering berhari-hari, exco negeri sendiri akui ia pencemaran sumber air terburuk pernah direkodkan, dan pada 21 April lepas paip kita kering lagi 23 jam.
seat.issue_en: Remember last November's water crisis? A sand-mine washing pond burst and polluted Sungai Johor — 455,499 water accounts across JB, Kulai and Kota Tinggi went dry for days, the state exco himself admitted it was the worst water-source pollution ever recorded, and this past 21 April our taps went dry again for 23 hours.
seat.receipt_bm: 31 Okt 2025: kekeruhan Sungai Johor melonjak ke 37,400 NTU (paras biasa ~400), 4 loji rawatan ditutup, 455,499 akaun terjejas (exco: ~1.2 juta pengguna) di JB, Kota Tinggi dan Kulai; hanya 448,057 akaun pulih menjelang 7 malam 3 Nov — Kulai antara yang terakhir. 21-22 Apr 2026: gangguan berjadual 23 jam lagi, meliputi Skudai dan Tiram.
seat.receipt_en: 31 Oct 2025: Sungai Johor turbidity spiked to 37,400 NTU (normal ~400), 4 treatment plants shut, 455,499 accounts affected (exco: ~1.2 million consumers) in JB, Kota Tinggi and Kulai; only 448,057 accounts restored by 7pm on 3 Nov — Kulai among the last back. 21-22 Apr 2026: another scheduled 23-hour cut, covering Skudai and Tiram.

seat.issue_bm: Januari 2025, air hitam berbuih berbau bangkai mengalir masuk Sungai Skudai di Kampung Sepakat Baru hampir dua minggu — Jabatan Alam Sekitar Johor sendiri kata loji kumbahan berdekatan 'trip' dan kumbahan mentah disyaki terlepas ke sungai kita; sampai hari ini, siapa yang didenda?
seat.issue_en: In January 2025, black, foaming water stinking of carcasses flowed into Sungai Skudai at Kampung Sepakat Baru for nearly two weeks — Johor's own Department of Environment said a nearby sewage plant tripped and raw sewage was suspected of escaping into our river; to this day, who has been fined?
seat.receipt_bm: 10-11 Januari 2025: Pengarah JAS Johor Dr Mohd Famey Yusoff mengesahkan loji rawatan kumbahan berhampiran Kampung Sepakat Baru, Skudai mengalami 'trip' bekalan elektrik dan pelepasan kumbahan mentah mungkin berlaku; penduduk lapor air hitam berbuih berbau bangkai mengalir ke Sungai Skudai sejak akhir Disember 2024.
seat.receipt_en: 10-11 January 2025: Johor DOE director Dr Mohd Famey Yusoff confirmed the sewage treatment plant near Kampung Sepakat Baru, Skudai suffered a power trip and raw sewage discharge may have occurred; residents reported black, foaming, carcass-smelling water flowing into Sungai Skudai since late December 2024.

seat.issue_bm: Segamat banjir lagi pada 28 Disember 2025 — 103 penduduk dipindahkan ke enam PPS dan Sungai Muar melepasi paras bahaya — sedangkan projek tebatan banjir RM1.6 bilion yang dijanjikan selepas banjir besar 2022/23 masih belum siap sehingga 2027, dan kontraktor asal projek lencongan Tanjung Olak gagal sehingga terpaksa diganti.
seat.issue_en: Segamat flooded yet again on 28 December 2025 — 103 residents evacuated to six relief centres with Sungai Muar past danger level — while the RM1.6 billion flood-mitigation projects promised after the 2022/23 disaster floods won't be finished until 2027, and the original contractor on the Tanjung Olak bypass failed and had to be replaced.
seat.receipt_bm: 28 Dis 2025: 103 mangsa banjir di 6 PPS di Segamat; Sungai Muar di Kg Awat catat 20m melepasi paras bahaya (Bernama). Mac 2025: 10,763 dipindahkan seluruh Johor (JB 4,291; Kulai 1,152). Projek RTB RM1.6 bilion (janji April 2024) hanya siap 2027.
seat.receipt_en: 28 Dec 2025: 103 flood victims in 6 relief centres in Segamat; Sungai Muar at Kg Awat hit 20m, past danger level (Bernama). March 2025: 10,763 evacuated statewide (JB 4,291; Kulai 1,152). The RM1.6 billion RTB projects (promised April 2024) only complete in 2027.

statewide.issue_bm: Sejak JS-SEZ dimeterai Januari 2025, harga apartmen servis di Johor Bahru melonjak 20.4% dalam setahun — anak muda Puteri Wangsa bergaji ringgit terpaksa bersaing dengan permintaan pelabur rentas sempadan untuk rumah pertama, sampai calon PH sendiri mengaku harga rumah tinggi untuk golongan muda adalah masalah utama di sini.
statewide.issue_en: Since the JS-SEZ was signed in January 2025, Johor Bahru serviced-apartment prices have jumped 20.4% in a single year — young Puteri Wangsa workers earning ringgit are competing with cross-border investor demand for their first home, and even the PH candidate admits high house prices for the young are a top problem here.
statewide.receipt_bm: 17 Julai 2025: FMT lapor data JLL Malaysia — harga apartmen servis Johor Bahru naik 20.4% setahun pada S2 2025 (teres dua tingkat +8.6%), didorong momentum JS-SEZ; 30 Jun 2026: Bernama lapor harga rumah tinggi bagi golongan muda antara isu utama di Puteri Wangsa.
statewide.receipt_en: 17 July 2025: FMT, citing JLL Malaysia — Johor Bahru serviced-apartment prices up 20.4% year-on-year in Q2 2025 (double-storey terraces +8.6%), driven by JS-SEZ momentum; 30 June 2026: Bernama reports high house prices for young people among the top issues in Puteri Wangsa.

statewide.issue_bm: Setahun selepas MB umum pelabur JS-SEZ setuju bayar "gaji premium" RM3,500, calon PH Puteri Wangsa sendiri mengaku remaja kita masih cicir sekolah untuk kerja gig atau kerja kasar di Singapura sebab bayarannya tiga kali ganda — dan dia akui kerajaan negeri sahaja tak mampu selesaikannya.
statewide.issue_en: A year after the MB announced JS-SEZ investors agreed to pay RM3,500 "premium salaries", PH's own Puteri Wangsa candidate admits local teens are still dropping out of school for gig work or manual jobs in Singapore paying triple — and that the state government alone cannot fix it.
statewide.receipt_bm: 30 Jun 2026 (Bernama): Maszlee sebut keciciran pelajaran remaja di Puteri Wangsa dan gaji kerja kasar Singapura "tiga kali ganda"; 20 Mei 2025 (Sinar Harian): Onn Hafiz umum pelabur JS-SEZ setuju gaji minimum RM3,500 (diploma) / RM4,000+ (ijazah), bersyarat produktiviti dan kemahiran.
statewide.receipt_en: 30 June 2026 (Bernama): Maszlee names teen school dropout in Puteri Wangsa and "triple" Singapore manual-job wages; 20 May 2025 (Sinar Harian): Onn Hafiz announced JS-SEZ investors agreed to RM3,500 (diploma) / RM4,000+ (degree) minimum salaries, conditional on productivity and skills.

statewide.issue_bm: Anak muda Muar terpaksa lari ke Singapura sebab gaji di sana tiga kali ganda — 16,930 rakyat Malaysia melepaskan kewarganegaraan pada 2024 sahaja dan lebih 350,000 berulang-alik setiap hari — sedangkan "gaji premium dari RM3,500" yang dijanjikan MB semuanya dalam zon JS-SEZ di selatan Johor, 150km dari Muar.
statewide.issue_en: Muar's young people are forced out to Singapore because pay there is roughly triple — 16,930 Malaysians gave up their citizenship in 2024 alone and over 350,000 commute daily — while the MB's promised "premium salaries from RM3,500" all sit in JS-SEZ zones in southern Johor, 150km from Muar.
statewide.receipt_bm: Jawapan Parlimen KDN, 11 Ogos 2025: 97,318 rakyat Malaysia jadi warga Singapura 2015–Jun 2025, rekod 16,930 pada 2024; lebih 350,000 ulang-alik ke Singapura setiap hari; janji MB "gaji premium dari RM3,500" (Mei 2025) terikat pada 9 zon utama JS-SEZ — kesemuanya di selatan Johor, tiada satu pun di Muar.
statewide.receipt_en: Home Ministry parliamentary reply, 11 Aug 2025: 97,318 Malaysians renounced citizenship for Singapore's between 2015 and June 2025, a record 16,930 in 2024; over 350,000 commute to Singapore daily; the MB's May 2025 "premium salaries from RM3,500" pledge is tied to the nine JS-SEZ flagship zones — all in southern Johor, none in Muar.

muda_stances.label_en: Low wages & the Singapore income drain
muda_stances.stance_bm: MUDA menuntut gaji minimum bermaruah — RM1,500 kolar biru dan RM2,500 kolar putih (berdasarkan anggaran gaji sara hidup Bank Negara 2019) — dan dalam kempen 2026, pembangunan serta peluang kerja mesti sampai ke Johor utara (Muar, Tangkak, Segamat, Batu Pahat), bukan tertumpu di selatan.
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA demands a dignified minimum wage — RM1,500 blue-collar and RM2,500 white-collar (based on Bank Negara's 2019 living-wage estimates) — and in the 2026 campaign, that development and jobs reach northern Johor (Muar, Tangkak, Segamat, Batu Pahat) rather than concentrating in the south.

quotes.text: I'm proposing the government to increase the minimum wage to at least RM1,500 and for white-collar workers, the minimum should be RM2,500, according to estimates issued by Bank Negara Malaysia in 2019.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (ketika itu Presiden MUDA)

quotes.text: Do we want to normalise the idea that Johoreans must go to Singapore to earn a decent income?
quotes.role_bm: Setiausaha Agung MUDA, calon Simpang Jeram

muda_stances.label_bm: Rumah mampu milik & lonjakan harga JS-SEZ
muda_stances.label_en: Affordable housing & the JS-SEZ price surge
muda_stances.stance_bm: Perumahan mampu milik ialah tunjang Blok Progresif (MUDA–PSM) 2026 — dan MUDA menentang dasar yang menggusur penghuni sedia ada: Syed Saddiq melabel Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar sebagai 'Akta Rampas Rumah' kerana ambang persetujuan diturunkan ke 80% dan penghuni flat B40/M40 berisiko digantikan kondominium mewah (Feb 2025). Manifesto PSM di Skudai paling konkrit: lebih banyak rumah mampu milik, kawalan sewa selaras pendapatan, dan rumah transit untuk keluarga muda. Nota jujur: tiada kenyataan MUDA khusus mengenai lonjakan 20.4% harga apartmen servis JB pasca-JS-SEZ ditemui.
muda_stances.stance_en: Affordable housing is a core Progressive Bloc (MUDA–PSM) 2026 pillar — and MUDA fights policies that displace existing residents: Syed Saddiq branded the Urban Renewal Act a 'House Confiscation Act' over its consent threshold dropping to 80% and B40/M40 flat dwellers risking replacement by luxury condos (Feb 2025). PSM's Skudai manifesto is the most concrete: more genuinely affordable homes, rent controls in line with incomes, and transit homes for young families. Honest note: no MUDA statement specifically on the post-JS-SEZ 20.4% JB serviced-apartment price surge was found.

quotes.text: The first item is to provide more affordable houses while also controlling rental costs to ensure that they are in line with people's income.

quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), mengenai Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), on the Urban Renewal Act

muda_stances.stance_bm: Rekod banjir MUDA terdokumentasi: Misi #MariBantu Dis 2021 mengumpul RM2 juta+ daripada 40,000 penderma untuk mangsa banjir 8 negeri — parti Malaysia pertama menerbitkan audit pihak ketiga untuk dana kemanusiaan (calon Maharani Amir Fiqri ialah Pengarah Logistik misi itu). Di Parlimen: usul tergempar darurat iklim (Dis 2022), soalan PMQT kepada PM mengenai langkah proaktif banjir (Feb 2025 — jawapan merekodkan projek TBBT RM1.64b Johor: Segamat, Batu Pahat, Ledang). Kempen 2026: Rashifa menjadikan penamatan banjir Puteri Wangsa ikrar utamanya; '5 Tekad' Ainie merangkumi kesiapsiagaan banjir.
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA's flood record is documented: the Dec 2021 #MariBantu mission raised RM2m+ from 40,000 donors for flood victims in 8 states — the first Malaysian party to publish a third-party audit of humanitarian funds (Maharani candidate Amir Fiqri was its Logistics Director). In Parliament: an urgent climate-emergency motion (Dec 2022) and a PMQT question on proactive flood steps (Feb 2025 — the answer put Johor's RM1.64b TBBT projects on record: Segamat, Batu Pahat, Ledang). In 2026: Rashifa made ending Puteri Wangsa's floods her lead pledge; Ainie's '5 Tekad' includes flood preparedness.

quotes.text: Don't wait too long if water levels start to rise. Move to safer areas as soon as possible. Your lives are more valuable than your belongings.
quotes.role_bm: ADUN Puteri Wangsa ketika itu (kini Presiden MUDA)
quotes.role_en: then Puteri Wangsa assemblywoman (now MUDA president)

quotes.text: As the MP of Muar, my application to help the people in Muar was rejected!

muda_stances.stance_bm: Nota jujur: TIADA kenyataan MUDA yang disahkan mengenai krisis paip kering JB (Mei 2025), pencemaran Sungai Johor akibat pecahan kolam cucian lombong pasir (Nov 2025) atau pencemaran Sungai Skudai (Jan 2025). Yang terdekat: tunjang kelestarian alam Blok Progresif, manifesto alam sekitar PSM Skudai (kawalan pencemaran lebih ketat, penyelenggaraan sungai, perunding EIA bebas), dan soalan saliran/banjir Amira di DUN Johor. AWAS: kenyataan lantang krisis air Nov 2025 datang dari Armada (sayap BERSATU — bukan MUDA), Amanah dan PAS — jangan salah petik.
muda_stances.stance_en: Honest note: NO verified MUDA statement was found on the JB dry-taps crisis (May 2025), the Sungai Johor sand-mine washing-pond pollution (Nov 2025) or the Sungai Skudai pollution (Jan 2025). Nearest positions: the Progressive Bloc's environmental-sustainability pillar, PSM Skudai's environment manifesto (stricter pollution controls, river maintenance, independent EIA consultants), and Amira's drainage/flood questions in the Johor DUN. CAUTION: the loud Nov 2025 water-crisis statements came from Armada (BERSATU's wing — not MUDA), Amanah and PAS — do not misquote.

muda_stances.stance_bm: Tawaran teras MUDA 2026: keempat-empat calon mengisytiharkan aset secara terbuka (RM23,000–RM476,236), ikrar utama memansuhkan undang-undang lima ADUN lantikan Johor, dan Presiden Amira Aisya mengecam penggunaan jentera kerajaan untuk kempen. Nota: Syed Saddiq tidak berkempen — keputusan rayuan Mahkamah Persekutuan ditangguh ke 13 Julai 2026, dua hari selepas pengundian.
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA's core 2026 offer: all four candidates publicly declared assets (RM23,000–RM476,236), the signature pledge is abolishing Johor's five appointed-ADUN law, and President Amira Aisya has called out the use of government machinery for campaigning. Note: Syed Saddiq is not campaigning — the Federal Court deferred his appeal verdict to 13 July 2026, two days after polling.

quotes.text: I don't have any political baggage. Some may say I'm inexperienced, but I'm inexperienced in corruption. I'm inexperienced in taking any bribe from any political parties.

muda_stances.stance_bm: Kos sara hidup ialah teras kempen MUDA Johor 2026 — manifesto '5 Tekad' Ainie Haziqah di Simpang Jeram meletakkannya di tempat pertama, merangkumi bukan sahaja harga barang tetapi kos taska, prasekolah dan pengangkutan keluarga muda (Julai 2026). Di peringkat nasional, Syed Saddiq mengetuai kritikan terhadap pelaksanaan subsidi RON95 bersasar dalam perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 (Okt 2024): jangan umumkan pemotongan sebelum kumpulan T15 ditakrifkan, kerana rakyat sudah mendengar apa yang bakal hilang.
muda_stances.stance_en: Cost of living is the core of MUDA's 2026 Johor campaign — Ainie Haziqah's '5 Tekad' manifesto in Simpang Jeram puts it first, covering not just goods prices but childcare, preschool and transport costs for young families (July 2026). Nationally, Syed Saddiq led criticism of the targeted RON95 subsidy rollout in the 2025 Budget debate (Oct 2024): don't announce cuts before the T15 group is even defined, because people have already heard what they stand to lose.

quotes.text: This is the problem when we announce first and think later.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 mengenai sasaran subsidi RON95/T15
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), 2025 Budget debate on RON95/T15 subsidy targeting

muda_stances.label_bm: SST diperluas, cukai barangan mewah dibatalkan
muda_stances.label_en: SST expansion while the luxury-goods tax was scrapped
muda_stances.stance_bm: Pendirian MUDA: keadilan cukai — kerajaan memperluas SST ke atas barangan dan perkhidmatan harian rakyat, tetapi membatalkan terus Cukai Barangan Bernilai Tinggi (HVGT) ke atas golongan ultra-kaya (Julai 2025). Cukai elit dahulu sebelum membebankan rakyat.
muda_stances.stance_en: MUDA's position: tax fairness — the government expanded SST onto everyday goods and services while completely scrapping the High Value Goods Tax (HVGT) on the ultra-rich (July 2025). Tax the elites before burdening the rakyat.

quotes.text: This is yet another step that shows the hypocrisy of the Madani Government. They once said they wanted to tax the ultra-rich, but the plan to introduce a tax like HVGT has been completely abandoned.
